name: Oatmeal Raisin Drop Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Oat Bran (for best results, use a coarse grind)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Spray baking sheets with non-stick cooking spray.
Plump raisins by steaming over hot water for 5 minutes.
Sift flour and measure then sift with baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Cream margarine with sugar (white and brown) until smooth.
Add egg and mix well.
Alternately add the flour mixture and buttermilk to the egg mixture. Blend until very smooth.
Stir in oatmeal, oat bran, raisins, and nuts.
Drop heaping teaspoonfuls onto prepared sheets.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until evenly browned.
Yield: 36 cookies
Each cookie has less than 1 gm saturated fat, 37 mg cholesterol, 1 gm soluble fiber, and 157 calories.
